decisions.rationale: AC-3 names Bubble phosphor icon entities (bTIdt/bTIeE/bTIeM) but brownfield frontend is lucide-react throughout (60+ files); icons are mounted at named ui_refs with data-bubble-id markers and semantically correct Phone/MessageSquare/Heart glyphs. criteria_audit AC-3 and all icon ui_evidence pass. Mirrors SHELL-02-sidebar-navigation C-2 deferral: glyph library parity is optional visual polish, not a composable contract. Downstream consumers (DASH-07 bTIfU, SET-01 bTIfw/bTIfa, PATHS bTIwu) depend_on CRISIS-01 for shared export and tel/sms anchors — not phosphor glyph fidelity.

Disclaimer bTIdn applies bubbleStyle(Text_caption_) then adds text-xs and text-muted-foreground; Tailwind utilities can override styles.json font_color var(--color_aiRNbAaxgs_default) though text-xs matches the 12px Text_caption_ size. criteria_audit AC-2 and ui_evidence Text_caption_ pass. Removing redundant Tailwind or mapping muted-foreground to the Bubble token is polish aligned with DS-01-design-tokens-and-bubble-styles — does not block SET-01 or PATHS crisis mounts.

Title/disclaimer column (bTIdg child) uses flex-col and gap-1 without display:flex, so gap-1 spacing may not apply; block-level h3/p still stack correctly. criteria_audit AC-2 and ui_evidence on bTIdm/bTIdn pass. One-line flex addition is micro-layout polish — does not affect shared export contract or downstream depends_on gates.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, 0 blockers, all ACs and functional checks pass. Deferred: C-1 lucide vs phosphor glyph parity (optional polish, SHELL-02 precedent); C-2 Text_caption_ Tailwind override (DS-01 token bridge); C-3 title column flex gap (micro-layout polish).
